task: Go to the URL and complete the form with hidden labels by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/hidden-labels-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL and correctly identified all required fields in the form, including those with hidden labels. It demonstrated good problem-solving by creating a temporary file for the document upload field using a bash command. All form fields were filled accurately, including email, state, date of birth, preferred contact method, and the document upload. Although there was a minor error in the initial attempt to set up a dialog handler (`page.once` vs `page.on`), the agent quickly corrected itself and successfully submitted the form. The final snapshot clearly showed the success message, validating that the form was filled and submitted successfully as requested by the user.
